nodes.context: Outlaw motorcycle club in Finland and Estonia, founded in 1991.
Outlaw motorcycle club; Cannonball operated as a support club for Hells Angels from 1991 to 1996.
Prospect chapter of Hells Angels during the Nordic Biker War.
Prospect club of Bandidos during the Nordic Biker War.
Outlaw motorcycle club; Undertakers MC was a prospect club of Bandidos.
Gang founded in Lahti in 2000 by former members of Cannonball's Lahti chapter.
Sub-division of Cannonball MC with six branches.
Rival motorcycle club involved in a shootout with Cannonball in Joensuu in 2020.
Allied with Chosen Ones MC; involved in shootout with Cannonball in 2020.

edges.evidence_quote: During the initial five years of its existence, Cannonball MC operated as a support club of the Hells Angels.
edges.context: Cannonball was a support club for Hells Angels from 1991 to 1996.

edges.evidence_quote: As a Hells Angels support club, Cannonball was aligned with the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC against the Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos, during the Nordic Biker War in the 1990s.
edges.context: Cannonball and Overkill were aligned against Undertakers MC during the Nordic Biker War.

edges.evidence_quote: As a Hells Angels support club, Cannonball was aligned with the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC against the Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos, during the Nordic Biker War in the 1990s.
edges.context: Cannonball was in conflict with Undertakers MC during the Nordic Biker War.

edges.evidence_quote: The former members of this chapter then founded the Rogues Gallery gang in the city in January 2000.
edges.context: Rogues Gallery was founded by former Cannonball members from the Lahti chapter.

edges.evidence_quote: Additionally, Cannonball's sub-division, Squad 32, has six branches.
edges.context: Squad 32 is a sub-division of Cannonball MC.

edges.evidence_quote: Nine motorcycle gang members were charged with various crimes, including attempted murder, after Cannonball members were involved in a shootout with rival bikers at the clubhouse of the Chosen Ones MC in Joensuu on 22 August 2020.
edges.context: Cannonball members were involved in a shootout with Chosen Ones MC in 2020.

edges.evidence_quote: Four members of the Chosen Ones and the allied Moraine MC were also charged in the case.
edges.context: Moraine MC was allied with Chosen Ones MC in the shootout with Cannonball.

edges.evidence_quote: As a Hells Angels support club, Cannonball was aligned with the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC against the Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos, during the Nordic Biker War in the 1990s.
edges.context: Overkill MC and Undertakers MC were on opposing sides in the Nordic Biker War.

edges.evidence_quote: Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos
edges.context: Undertakers MC was a prospect club of Bandidos.

edges.evidence_quote: the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC
edges.context: Overkill MC was a prospect chapter of Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: Four members of the Chosen Ones and the allied Moraine MC were also charged in the case.
edges.context: Moraine MC was allied with Chosen Ones MC.
